li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and contains(defName, "Warcasket") and apparel/bodyPartGroups/li="Torso" and not(contains(defName, "Shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Bodysuit")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and contains(defName, "Warcasket") and apparel/bodyPartGroups/li="Torso" and not(contains(defName, "Shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Bodysuit")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_Vacsuit" or defName="Apparel_VacsuitChildren" or defName="VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige" or defName="Apparel_EVAsuit") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_Vacsuit" or defName="Apparel_VacsuitChildren" or defName="VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige" or defName="Apparel_EVAsuit") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_SealedUndersuit" or defName="Apparel_AstroSuit" or defName="Apparel_SecurityArmor" or defName="Apparel_OrbitalArmor") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_SealedUndersuit" or defName="Apparel_AstroSuit" or defName="Apparel_SecurityArmor" or defName="Apparel_OrbitalArmor") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_GasMask" or contains(defName, "GasMask") or defName="VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask" or contains(defName, "WarcasketHelmet") or defName="Apparel_AstroMask") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_GasMask" or contains(defName, "GasMask") or defName="VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask" or contains(defName, "WarcasketHelmet") or defName="Apparel_AstroMask") and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PowerArmor") or contains(defName, "ArmorRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarine") or contains(defName, "ArmorCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorLocust") or contains(defName, "ArmorPhoenix") or contains(defName, "MechlordSuit") or contains(defName, "ArmorAbsolver") or contains(defName, "ArmorDeserter") or defName="VFEP_Apparel_Privateer") and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PowerArmor") or contains(defName, "ArmorRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarine") or contains(defName, "ArmorCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorLocust") or contains(defName, "ArmorPhoenix") or contains(defName, "MechlordSuit") or contains(defName, "ArmorAbsolver") or contains(defName, "ArmorDeserter") or defName="VFEP_Apparel_Privateer") and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PowerArmorHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarineHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetMech") or contains(defName, "AbsolverHelmet") or contains(defName, "DeserterHelmet") or contains(defName, "JanissaryHelmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PowerArmorHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarineHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetMech") or contains(defName, "AbsolverHelmet") or contains(defName, "DeserterHelmet") or contains(defName, "JanissaryHelmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PlagueMask") or contains(label, "plague mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "PlagueMask") or contains(label, "plague mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_ClothMask" or contains(defName, "SurgicalMask") or contains(label, "surgical mask") or contains(label, "face mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (defName="Apparel_ClothMask" or contains(defName, "SurgicalMask") or contains(label, "surgical mask") or contains(label, "face mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Suit") or contains(label, "suit") or contains(defName, "Armor") or contains(defName, "Armour") or contains(label, "armor") or contains(label, "armour") or contains(defName, "Cuirass") or contains(label, "cuirass") or contains(defName, "Flak") or contains(label, "flak") or contains(defName, "WarcasketShoulders") or contains(label, "warcasket shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(contains(label, "helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Suit") or contains(label, "suit") or contains(defName, "Armor") or contains(defName, "Armour") or contains(label, "armor") or contains(label, "armour") or contains(defName, "Cuirass") or contains(label, "cuirass") or contains(defName, "Flak") or contains(label, "flak") or contains(defName, "WarcasketShoulders") or contains(label, "warcasket shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(contains(label, "helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Mask") or contains(label, "mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Mask") or contains(label, "mask")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Helmet") or contains(label, "helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and modExtensions and (contains(defName, "Helmet") or contains(label, "helmet")) and not(modExtensions/li[@Class="TheMarkedMen.MarkedVirusProtectionExtension"])]/modExtensions
